testCaseName: 2nd N-Of query requesting 2 of 3 mutations with aggregated action
query: default.filter(nOf(2, {nucleotideEquals(position:=1, symbol:='-', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=2, symbol:='T', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=27542, symbol:='N', sequenceName:='main')})).groupBy({count:=count()})
